title: Minimum Cost to Move Chips to The Same Position

testcases.input: position = [1,2,3] Output: 1 Explanation: First step: Move the chip at position 3 to position 1 with cost = 0. Second step: Move the chip at position 2 to position 1 with cost = 1. Total cost is 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: First step: Move the chip at position 3 to position 1 with cost = 0. Second step: Move the chip at position 2 to position 1 with cost = 1. Total cost is 1.

testcases.input: position = [2,2,2,3,3] Output: 2 Explanation: We can move the two chips at position 3 to position 2. Each move has cost = 1. The total cost = 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can move the two chips at position 3 to position 2. Each move has cost = 1. The total cost = 2.
